channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Heavy plant being parked on grassed corner by Valcon and Doocey has smashed and damaged edging stone on public path/drive., 22nd April
item.description:
Outside house 'Beechgarth', Parton Road, Churchdown. GL3 2JH.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28day please repair x1 chipped kerb stone with concrete fillet 200x100x50mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Pothole CW 600x400x45mm Road closure X 2 NSD No parking cones required before work starting (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 1200x300x20mm slightly ramp up tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please turn direction sign around right way and tighten 1000x800mm approx 3 meters high (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 400x200x20mm slightly ramp around gas cover tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 600x100x20mm slightly ramp up from cover tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 1300x340x21mm tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28day please relay x1 rocking raised 900x100x30mm dropped kerb (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken/cracked manhole cover reported May 2025, 22nd April
item.description:
Left corner as you come out of Lear’s drive on grass verge. Reported May 2025. Still not fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Lears Drive, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please lift and relay x1 rocking raised 450x450x20mm slab (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 15 db 28 day carriage way pothole approx 300x300x50mm number 1 plus x1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
